reasoning: Technical execution is solid: 1px hard outlines present on all panels, 3-tone hard shading on blade (dark/mid/highlight) and 2-tone on orange handle, pixels are grid-snapped with no anti-aliasing, hand-pixeled feel throughout. Technical score ~7. Emotional axis is weaker: the warm orange handle adds some brightness but the overall battle-axe silhouette is angular and aggressive — not the round, friendly, toy-diorama quality that defines Zelda EoW. The blade's gray/silver tones read as cold and utilitarian rather than charming. The Denzi reference weapons are more compact, higher-contrast, and 'cute' in proportion; this axe trends toward realistic weapon design. Missing the saturated greens/blues/yellows/pinks that anchor the franchise palette. Emotional score ~5. Weighted total: 0.6×5 + 0.4×7 = 5.8 → 6, marginal.
